jobs.title: AI Software Tool Engineer
jobs.description:
1. Develop and integrate AI agent harness
2. Develop and integrate software engineering system to improve software development lifecycle
3. Collect / analyze system requirement & system design
4. Support urgent system function or performance problem

jobs.title: AI Software and System Architecture Engineer
jobs.description:
This role serves as the AI architecture owner and the single-threaded DRI (Directly Responsible Individual) for key customers. You will work closely with customers and internal R&D/product/platform teams to translate requirements into shippable technical solutions, drive end-to-end AI system design, ensure performance/quality targets, and close the loop on escalations. The ideal candidate is both technically strong and execution-focused, capable of leading cross-functional efforts from definition to delivery.

#LI-LYNN

jobs.title: Senior Embedded Power System Software Engineer
jobs.description:
• Developing the PMIC, battery charger and fuel gauge driver/framework in Android/ Linux system. Support customer problem handling and customized requirements.
• Developing power management solutions to maximize energy efficiency and optimize power consumption in electronic systems.
• Analyzing and improving system performance through testing, simulation, and optimization of hardware and software components.
• Conducting thorough analysis and validation of power consumption and performance aspects to meet industry standards and customer requirements.
• System Software Integration development and integration

jobs.title: TV Software - System Engineer
jobs.description:
Responsible for software system development and maintenance of smart TV products, including: 
1. Linux Kernel integration, driver development, system performance optimization, and troubleshooting.
2. Collaborate closely with hardware and application software teams to ensure product functionality and quality meet market requirements.

This position also involves participation in international projects and requires occasional business travel.
